scripts.db:migrate:staging: vercel env run -e preview -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:production: vercel env run -e production -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.user:create:staging: vercel env run -e preview -- tsx scripts/create-user.ts --environment=staging
scripts.user:create:production: vercel env run -e production -- tsx scripts/create-user.ts --environment=production
scripts.user:ui:staging: vercel env run -e preview -- tsx scripts/admin-ui-server.ts --environment=staging
scripts.user:ui:production: vercel env run -e production -- tsx scripts/admin-ui-server.ts --environment=production
scripts.report:create:staging: vercel env run -e preview -- tsx scripts/create-physio-report.ts --environment=staging
scripts.report:create:production: vercel env run -e production -- tsx scripts/create-physio-report.ts --environment=production
